chunks.title: The King's Sleep and Haman's Arrival
chunks.reason: Describes the king finding Mordecai's record and summoning Haman who arrives to request Mordecai's execution.

chunks.title: Haman's Proposal and the King's Command
chunks.reason: Contains Haman's internal monologue, his suggestion for honoring a man, and the king's specific order to honor Mordecai.

chunks.title: Haman's Humiliation and the Feast Call
chunks.reason: Narrates Haman returning home in mourning, his wife's counsel regarding Mordecai, and the arrival of eunuchs for Esther's feast.
